content:
# AI Service Finder Response

A customer says: "I received a transport fine and want to know what to do next." The assistant should route them to payment or review pathways without making legal or enforcement determinations.

## Retrieved Context

| Source context | How it informs the response | Freshness / risk |
| --- | --- | --- |
| QLDTraffic GeoJSON/API notes | Demonstrates how operational feeds can be cited as external context. | Traffic data is provided on an as-is basis. |
| Road crash locations dataset | Useful for road-safety context, not for deciding infringement liability. | Historical/open-data context only. |
| Registration/call-centre enquiry themes | Helps classify payment, dispute, and support enquiries. | Aggregated trend only. |
| Queensland Open Data catalogue | Makes the response auditable by source category. | Source links should be revalidated in production. |

## Recommended Service

| Recommendation | Reason |
| --- | --- |
| Pay or manage infringement | The customer intent refers to a fine. |
| Infringement lookup | Notice details are needed before options can be shown. |
| Review pathway | Some customers may need dispute or hardship options. |
| Support pathway | Payment failure, hardship, or legal-review questions should not be answered by the model alone. |

## Required Information

| Item | Use |
| --- | --- |
| Notice number | Finds the infringement record. |
| Surname or organisation | Helps verify lookup. |
| Due date | Determines urgency and available actions. |
| Contact details | Used for receipt or review updates. |

## Confidence and Review Flags

| Signal | Assessment |
| --- | --- |
| Intent confidence | Medium-high |
| Source confidence | Medium: intent routing is clear, offence details require verified backend lookup |
| Human review | Required for dispute, hardship, or enforcement advice |
| Sensitive data | Avoid showing full offence details until verified |

## Knowledge Graph

```mermaid
graph LR
    Intent[Customer intent] --> Retrieval[Retrieved context]
    Retrieval --> QLDTraffic[QLDTraffic feed]
    Retrieval --> CrashData[Road safety open data]
    Retrieval --> Enquiries[Call-centre themes]
    Intent --> Service[Fine management]
    Service --> Notice[Notice lookup]
    Notice --> Pay[Payment option]
    Notice --> Review[Review option]
    Notice --> Support[Support pathway]
    Pay --> Receipt[Receipt]
    Review --> Human[Human review]
```

## Safe Response Notes

- Do not state whether the fine is valid.
- Offer payment, review, and support paths neutrally.
- Make payment status and receipt handling explicit.
- Display source and stale-data warnings before using open-data context for transactional guidance.
